level_signals: 5-8 years as a Product Owner, Business Analyst, or Systems Analyst
First role of this type at Harvey — high ownership, few explicit guidelines

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5-8 years as a Product Owner, Business Analyst, or Systems Analyst. Background in consulting or a high-growth tech company is required.

Ability to demonstrate a portfolio of AI first principles. You will be expected to both explain the technical nature of different models and platforms, and show micro-apps you have built on Claude, Lovable, n8n, Replit, or other agentic applications.

Proven experience understanding the relationship between technology and users. Strong ability to extrapolate data structures across platforms into a baseline that can be used by both end users and agents.
Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills and experience with BI tools. You don't just pull reports; you tell stories with data.

Exceptional ability to gather requirements from non-technical stakeholders and transform them into elegant, scalable technical solutions. Track record of iteration with technical development teams and delivering projects from inception to hypercare.

Gather requirements and help design advanced automations that drive speed and efficiency. You'll be deeply focused on top of funnel optimization, knocking down inefficiencies and bringing automation across business units.
Leverage tools (like Clay, Claude, Gong, etc.) and AI agents to automate account research and prospect prioritization, ensuring our sales team spends 100% of their time on high-value interactions.
Manage data integrity, deduplication, and system audits. You will document our evolving data models and process flows to ensure we remain scalable as we double in size.
This is the first role of this type at Harvey, so you need to be comfortable operating with high ownership and few explicit guidelines.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience operating as a founder or partner in a consulting agency.
Experience as the first member of a new team

scope.surface: Revenue Technology / GTM stack — marketing, sales, and success motions including orchestration and data layers
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS, enterprise-focused legal and professional services AI platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Top of funnel conversion and efficiency
Sales team time on high-value interactions (prospect prioritization)
core_responsibilities: Partner with GTM to translate business objectives into technical requirements
Design advanced automations to drive speed and efficiency across GTM lifecycle
Leverage AI agents and tools (Clay, Claude, Gong) to automate account research and prospect prioritization
Act as liaison between Marketing, Sales, RevOps, and GTM Systems
Manage data integrity, deduplication, and system audits
Document evolving data models and process flows
Guide strategic evaluations of projects and platforms
Build agentic applications and bespoke tooling

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and wide ($164K-$240K base)
Clear articulation of responsibilities and ownership scope
First-of-kind role — significant opportunity to shape function from scratch
Strong product-market fit and growth trajectory cited (1500+ customers, 60+ countries)
Cross-functional visibility across Marketing, Sales, RevOps, GTM Systems
red_flags: Location not stated anywhere in the JD — work arrangement (remote/hybrid/onsite) is completely unclear
Very wide comp band ($76K spread) may indicate significant variance in level or location adjustments
No equity mention despite early-stage company — may be intentional omission or oversight
High ambiguity role ('few explicit guidelines') with high ownership could indicate org growing faster than structure
Buzzword-heavy JD ('agentic', 'AI first principles', 'hypercare') may obscure actual day-to-day scope

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years range and comp band)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description: legal/professional services AI, B2B SaaS)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated)
ambiguities: Role title includes 'Product Owner' but responsibilities are closer to a GTM Systems/RevOps technical program manager — archetype set to Technical Program Manager with BizOps secondary.
Years range '5-8' is given in the What You Have section (required), but no minimum is separately enforced beyond this statement. Treated as hard requirement.
